# Oslo Bike Tours

Oslo Bike Tours offers private, fully guided bike tours in Oslo, Norway.
Small groups (max 8 people), hotel pickup, local guides Eivind and Haakon.

## Tours

- Oslo City Highlights — 18 km, 2 hours, road, easy. Aker Brygge, Opera House, Vigeland Park, Royal Palace. NOK 890/person.
- Bygdøy Peninsula — 28 km, 2.5 hours, road, medium. Fjord views, Viking Ship Museum, Folk Museum. NOK 1 050/person.
- Nordmarka Forest (Ring 4) — 45 km, 4 hours, gravel, medium. Pine and birch forest, Kikutstua cabin, Sognsvann lake. NOK 1 450/person.
- Epic Marka Endurance — 85 km, 6 hours, gravel, challenging. Deep Nordmarka wilderness, remote lakes, ridge climbs. Max 8 riders. NOK 2 150/person.
- Oslo Coffee Tour — 22 km, 3 hours, road, easy. Oslo's world-class specialty coffee scene — Tim Wendelboe, Supreme Roastworks, Fuglen, Java. Light roast drip coffee, 80+ micro-roasteries nationwide. NOK 1 190/person. Coffee and pastry at each stop included.
- Oslo Architecture Tour — 30 km, 3 hours, road, easy. Nordic functionalism — Arne Korsmo, Villa Stenersen, Planetveien 12, Havna Allé, Villa Dammann. NOK 1 310/person.

## Key facts

- All tours are private — no strangers in your group
- Guide picks you up at your hotel
- Tours tailored to your pace and preferences
- Optional café stops available on all tours
- Gravel bike and e-bike rentals available
- Bike not included in base price
- Based in Oslo, Norway
